description: ERC-7730 Storage Layout File. Extends the Solidity compiler storageLayout output (--storage-layout flag) with optional ERC-7730 display annotations. The 'storage' array and 'types' object are compatible with Solidity compiler output; each storage entry may carry a 'display' object describing how to present that variable's value to users during transaction simulation display.

$schema.title: Schema
$schema.description: The schema this file conforms to.

$comment.title: Comment
$comment.description: An optional comment string documenting the purpose or provenance of this file.

storage.title: Storage variables
storage.description: Ordered list of contract state variables, matching the Solidity compiler storageLayout 'storage' array. Each entry may include an optional 'display' object with ERC-7730 display annotations.

astId.description: AST node ID of the variable declaration. Matches Solidity compiler output.

contract.description: Fully-qualified contract name (file:ContractName). Matches Solidity compiler output.

label.description: Solidity variable name as declared in source. Matches Solidity compiler output.

offset.description: Byte offset within the storage slot where this variable begins (for packed variables). Matches Solidity compiler output.

slot.description: Storage slot number as a decimal string. Matches Solidity compiler output.

type.description: Type identifier referencing an entry in the 'types' object. Matches Solidity compiler output.

types.title: Type definitions
types.description: Type definitions referenced by storage entries, matching the Solidity compiler storageLayout 'types' object.

displayAnnotation.title: Display annotation
displayAnnotation.description: ERC-7730 display annotation for a storage variable. Describes how to present the variable's value to users during transaction simulation display. Uses the same formatter vocabulary as display.formats[*].fields[*] in the parent ERC-7730 file. For mapping and array types, the 'label' field may use {key[N]} placeholders to embed key values: {key[0]} is the outermost mapping key, {key[1]} the next level, and so on. {index} is available for array entries.

label.description: User-facing name for this storage variable. For mappings, {key[N]} placeholders embed key values (e.g. 'Balance of {key[0]}'). For arrays, {index} embeds the element index.

format.description: ERC-7730 formatter to apply when displaying the value. Same set as display.formats[*].fields[*].format (tokenAmount, addressName, raw, date, enum, unit, etc.).

params.description: Formatter parameters. Same structure as display.formats[*].fields[*].params for the chosen format.

typeDefinition.title: Type definition
typeDefinition.description: A Solidity type definition, matching the Solidity compiler storageLayout 'types' object entries.

encoding.description: Storage encoding strategy. 'inplace': value stored directly in slot (or packed). 'mapping': slot is computed via keccak256(key || baseSlot). 'dynamic_array': length at base slot, elements at keccak256(baseSlot) + index. 'bytes': short strings/bytes packed in slot, long ones at keccak256(baseSlot).

numberOfBytes.description: Number of bytes this type occupies in storage, as a decimal string.

key.description: For mapping types: type identifier of the mapping key.

value.description: For mapping and dynamic_array types: type identifier of the value/element type.

base.description: For dynamic_array types: type identifier of the element type (alias of 'value', matches compiler output).

members.description: For struct types: ordered list of struct member descriptions.
